examples: And yet the town, and its province of Limburg, are Mr Wilders's heartland.
People from Limburg are always welcoming. And you will never forget that feeling.
The river Maas meanders in the east - and forms the natural border with Dutch-Limburg.
But in border cities in the provinces of Limburg and North Brabant, there are local officials and residents who support the introduction of a weed pass.
In Uden (in the province of Brabant) vandals set fire to an Islamic school, and in Venray (Limburg) there were violent clashes between Christian and Muslim youngsters.
